query:
SELECT p.id, p.serialNumber, p.productName, p.importedCategoryName, p.importedBrandName, p.batchNo, p.poNumber, p.sheetRowNumber, p.createdAt, p.updatedAt
FROM products p
WHERE p.serialNumber = 'V42J4RV4FF';

SELECT se.id, se.stationCode, se.stationEventType, se.businessDate, se.categoryId, se.subtypeCode, se.createdAt
FROM station_events se
JOIN products p ON p.id = se.productId
WHERE p.serialNumber = 'V42J4RV4FF'
ORDER BY se.id DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:

FROM products p
WHERE p.serialNumber = 'V42J4RV4FF';

SELECT se.id, se.stationCode, se.stationEventType, se.businessDate, se.categoryId, se.subtypeCode, se.createdAt
FROM station_events se
JOIN products p ON p.id = se.productId
WHERE p.serialNumber = 'V42J4RV4FF'
ORDER BY se.id DESC
LIMIT 20;
